case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MANUEL ANTONIO LAVADORES FUENTES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUENTES, MANUEL ANTONIO LAVADORES $410.17 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECITONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL ANTONIO LAVADORES FUENTES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $410.17 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, MANUEL ANTONIO LAVADORES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
